query:
SELECT
            t.mod_id AS "project_id!",
            tm.created,
            tm.body AS "body: sqlx::types::Json<MessageBody>"
        FROM threads_messages tm
        INNER JOIN threads t ON t.id = tm.thread_id
        WHERE
            t.mod_id = ANY($1)
            AND tm.body->>'type' = 'status_change'
            AND tm.created BETWEEN $2 AND $3
